presentation.excerpt: An Ivorian digital media dedicated to the gastronomic universe in all its forms: cooking, agriculture, food innovation, culinary heritage and food culture.
presentation.fullText: Born from a passion for local flavors and a curiosity for global trends, actufoody.com tells food like a story — with rigor, respect and emotion. We give voice to street cooks as well as starred chefs, to fonio producers as well as emerging food-techs, to nutrition researchers as well as food sovereignty activists. Based in Abidjan, actufoody.com addresses a demanding, curious and engaged audience in Côte d'Ivoire, Africa and the diaspora.
